hyperedges.label: Linear Pipeline 7-Step Sequence
12-Branch Layered Pipeline Tree
8 Baseline Models Compared
Data Leakage Prevention Design Decisions
SHAP Explainer Selection by Model Type
Core Study Findings
Dataset Input Files
Python Dependencies
Linear Pipeline: Steps 0-6 Executed by run_full_pipeline.py
Layered Pipeline: 6 Orchestrated Stages in run_layered_pipeline.py
Dataset Build: Four CSVs Produced by build_dataset.py
Baseline Training: Holdout + LOEO Metrics, Predictions, Models
Augmentation Strategies: none, feature_noise, feature_scaling, grouped_scaling
Four-Metric Evaluation: MAE, RMSE, R², MAPE
Anti-Leakage Design Decisions Embedded in Pipeline
Presentation Consumes Layered Pipeline Outputs for All 34 Slides
Step 3 Ranking: Nine Summary CSVs from All-Metrics
Data Pipeline Flow: raw signals -> features -> dataset
12-segment feature extraction (6 contacts x 2 directions)
Three augmentation strategies applied to training data only
LOEO-CV mechanism: LeaveOneGroupOut over experiment_id
12-branch layered experimental pipeline (N/A x ST/CT_random/CT_grid x 3aug)
Anti-leakage guardrails: split by experiment_id, protected cols, 6 formal checks
SHAP explainer type selected by model family
13 time-domain features per segment
3 FFT-derived frequency features per segment
8 sklearn-compatible model pipeline builders
4 regression metrics: MAE, RMSE, R2, MAPE
Layered visual suite for 12-branch LOEO pipeline
Central config: paths, target, split params, augmentation params
Data Quality Charts: Missing Segments, Raw File Count, VB Distribution, VB vs Order
Feature Analysis Charts: Correlation Heatmap, Missingness, Top Correlated Features
Pipeline Results Charts: Flow Diagram, Actual vs Predicted, Augmentation Effects
Signal Example Charts: Axial Grid, A_p1, R_p1 for Experiment 66
All ElasticNet LOEO Configurations Compared
Three Data Augmentation Strategies in Pipeline
Three Tuning Methods: ST, CT_random, CT_grid
Experiments with Incomplete Raw Data: 76 and 77
N-branch Real Data Family (N_ST, N_CT_random, N_CT_grid)
A-branch Feature Noise Augmentation Family
A-branch Feature Scaling Augmentation Family
A-branch Grouped Scaling Augmentation Family
All 12 Branch MAE Performance Comparison (LOEO-CV)
Linear Models Dominate (ElasticNet and Lasso Win All Branches)
Full Model x Branch Heatmap Evaluation
Random vs Grid Search Tuning Equivalence Across Augmentation Types
Delta vs Baseline Analysis Charts
Model Evolution Across 12 Branches (All Metrics LOEO-CV)
SHAP Interpretability for ElasticNet Models (N_ST and A_ST_feature_noise)
Top Shared Features Across ElasticNet Models: Acoustic Skewness, RMS Std, Crest Factor
LOEO Residual Analysis Suite: Scatter, Per-Experiment Bar, Multi-Config Overlay
Sequential Comparison Dashboards for MAE, RMSE, and R2 Metrics
Worst-Case Experiments: exp66(+47µm), exp69(+49µm), exp76(-50µm), exp77(-82µm)
SHAP Interpretability for XGBoost N_CT_random Model
